content: Red variant will catch All of your shitty neutral, he can deal 40 Dmg out of an m1 +blue +R+3.
But if he rushes you down he will suffer. He should stay on the defensive
you basically have the same mobility, but he has more style with roles, better combos, better DMG, better consistency blah blah blah,
he also has a counter which ruins you.
You could say your trades are better than him, because you keep your mobility after a full combo.
Counter fucks you over.
You lost when divine dog came out.
Gg, he has stockpile which denies m1 trades, he may not have s counter. But he can get more chip than you.
Congrats, choso is no longer the weakest character (without orbs) he instantly gets ORBs from hoe aggressive you are
(counters and green). Also bleedout is useless. Overall beats you
Nothing to be said
You also have the mobility to go in and out,
only issue is that you shouldn't R R and go right in (as jiggy) since he wil have 2 dashes on your face,
but you have 1 variant to clutch up, since it has Mele iframes
Unlike Charles, even if you on purpose miss your neutral, outburst will punishes your neutral,
it's a free parry or outburst explosion. He has second wind to catch your whiffed m1s, and he has rika smash/haymaker,
he shouldn't use launch since you would get to lock on him
He has way better neutral than you, heat emission, greater evaisve bait,
he gains 100% more from landing an M1 than you ever do. He still has his neutral r1 for M1 trades,
4 to catch you, puppet barrage to force block, puppet barrage into heat emission etc.
This is the most fun you will have on this character,
he is really chaotic fun since you can frame yourself to escape a combo or instantly get a frame from your enemy.
Nothing much to be said. His neutral is better than yours lol. Get your legs broken and die
RUSHDOWN Vs zoner, gg no re, you lost
Your only advantage is that you can close the gap and profit 100% of his r special,
and use your tp to be close. Also you can dodge granite blast charged easier.
He still is getting to stall combos, stall our your projection meter, force you to block so many times,
he can't catch you like others (where 3 is basically free and really hard to punish).
But yeah, you both have punishable m1s so. If Ryu gets an M1 he is going to deal heavy DMG.
Also you will be using your double dashes to get close, you lose your m1 trade advantage
Depending on who is better at M1 trades, they win. Also if you get spit... Yeha you deal basically 0 DMG.
4r and 2rr, she gets to deal actual DMG out of any hit. You don't.
She doesn't have much other than side dash M1 (if she doesn't have mass) but she still has rebound to knock you out of skills
You're fucked, his R special, his counters, just fuck you over. He walks you down.
Only if you on purpose miss moves to bait counters, maybe then (but this is being smarter/more skilled than the Charles)
He can just dodge everything you do, even if you miss he doenst lose shit.
He has the sword to stop all your engaging, yeah good luck.
Your neutral is gone, bird, or any of her moves (due to the big hitboxes) catch you up,
mei Mei forces block a lot and you're playing a hyper aggressive character. You're fucked
Kuro shouldn't pull you in with his 2, since you will have 2 dashes on his face.
He should go for the 2 jump variant (the pull) other than that he is very safe,
R special makes you unable to M1 trade, 1 denies your aggressiveness, 4 is a gap closer+ chip,
3 can be used in an M1 trade to cheese you too.
